calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Viridiana Ordonez,Esq., appearing for the defendant. No appearance by the Plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no appearance by the plaintiff or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Discovery
Off Calendar Dec-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing re:DEFENDANT DARIUS CROWLEY'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Discovery.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

"Defendant's motion to compel plaintiff's responses to discovery" is granted; no timely opposition filed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Richard B Ulmer Jr; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported.(302/RBU)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF ELTOM GOMES.

Thuy Le's unopposed motion to be relieved as counsel is granted.

Order is signed.
